questions.question: Which statement best separates an architecture description from a detailed system inventory?
options: Key structures, relations, and principles of the system
All deployed assets, versions, owners, and configurations
Implementation tasks, deadlines, roles, and milestones
Service tickets, incidents, workarounds, and support logs
questions.explanation: Architecture abstracts the fundamental structures and principles; inventories, project plans, and support records are different artefacts.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最能区分 architecture description 和详细系统清单？
questions.answerZh: 它在抽象层面说明关键结构、关系和原则。
questions.memory: Architecture = structure + elements + relationships + principles。
questions.clue: 不要把 architecture 和 inventory / project plan / support log 混淆。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项强调抽象结构和关系；其他选项分别是资产清单、项目计划或运维记录。

questions.question: Which situation best fits the EA meaning of an enterprise?
options: A set of business units and partners coordinated around shared goals
A single application selected by an IT department for internal reporting
A database schema maintained by one team for one operational process
A software module owned by one developer within a larger solution
questions.explanation: An enterprise can include multiple units or organizations if they share goals or a bottom line.
questions.questionZh: 哪种情况最符合 EA 中 enterprise 的含义？
questions.answerZh: 多个业务单元和合作方围绕共同目标协同运作。
questions.memory: Enterprise 不等于 IT 部门，也不一定只是单一公司。
questions.clue: enterprise 的范围比 application、database、module 大。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现共同目标和跨单位协同；其他选项范围太窄。

questions.question: A store employee says a new checkout system may slow customer service. In architecture work, this statement is best treated as:
options: A stakeholder concern to be addressed by an appropriate view
A platform-specific model that defines the software deployment
A business model element describing how revenue is generated
A technology service that realizes an application component
questions.explanation: A stakeholder concern is an issue or interest that architecture work should address.
questions.questionZh: 员工担心新结账系统拖慢服务，在架构工作中这最好被看作什么？
questions.answerZh: 需要用合适 view 回应的 stakeholder concern。
questions.memory: Stakeholder 有 concern；EA 要回应 concern。
questions.clue: 某个角色提出担心 = stakeholder concern。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项把员工视为 stakeholder，把担心视为 concern；其他选项属于 MDA、BMC 或 ArchiMate 技术概念。

questions.question: A firm has duplicated customer data, inconsistent processes, and applications that do not support business change. Which EA rationale is most directly involved?
options: Managing complexity and improving business-IT alignment
Replacing process analysis with financial benchmarking
Restricting architecture work to software implementation
Documenting service incidents without changing architecture
questions.explanation: EA is used to manage complexity and align business needs with IT capabilities.
questions.questionZh: 企业客户数据重复、流程不一致、应用不支持业务变化，最直接体现 EA 的哪个理由？
questions.answerZh: 管理复杂性并改善 business-IT alignment。
questions.memory: EA 两大痛点：complexity + poor business-IT alignment。
questions.clue: duplicated data、inconsistent process、applications not supporting business 都指向 EA。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项对应 EA 的核心痛点；其他选项只涉及局部管理或运维活动。

questions.question: Why should an EA initiative define its enterprise boundary before modelling?
options: Actors, processes, systems, and relationships in scope
Final notation, symbols, viewpoints, and diagram style
All implementation details, data values, and configurations
Hardware assets, software licences, and support tickets
questions.explanation: Boundary definition clarifies what is included in the architecture scope.
questions.questionZh: 为什么 EA 建模前要先定义 enterprise boundary？
questions.answerZh: 为了确定哪些参与者、流程、系统和关系在范围内。
questions.memory: 先定 scope/boundary，再谈架构。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项强调范围界定；其他选项把边界误解成符号选择、穷尽细节或资产清单。

questions.question: Which statement best shows that EA is broader than IT architecture?
options: Organization, processes, information systems, and infrastructure
Networks, servers, devices, deployment locations, and hosting zones only
Application code, database tables, interface classes, and packages only
Technical assets without stakeholder, process, or business concerns
questions.explanation: EA covers organization, business processes, information systems, and infrastructure.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最能说明 EA 比 IT architecture 范围更广？
questions.answerZh: 它连接组织结构、业务流程、信息系统和基础设施。
questions.memory: EA = organization + process + IS + infrastructure。
questions.clue: broader than IT architecture = business + organization + IT。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项包含业务和组织维度；其他选项把 EA 缩小成技术视角。

questions.question: Why can one architecture require several different views?
options: Stakeholders have different concerns and detail needs
Architecture views must use different modelling tools
Viewpoints should hide stakeholder interests from models
Views are created only after implementation is complete
questions.explanation: Views are tailored to stakeholder concerns using viewpoint conventions.
questions.questionZh: 为什么同一个 architecture 可能需要多个不同 view？
questions.answerZh: 因为不同 stakeholders 需要回应不同 concerns 的 views。
questions.memory: 不同 stakeholder -> 不同 concern -> 不同 view。
questions.clue: view 和 stakeholder concern 绑定。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项解释了 view 的目的；其他选项混淆数据库、viewpoint 或架构生命周期。

questions.question: A digital strategy must be reflected in redesigned processes, updated applications, and new data responsibilities. EA mainly contributes by:
options: Turning strategy into coordinated enterprise change
Selecting vendors without linking them to business goals
Recording service incidents without redesigning architecture
Describing a business model without implementation impact
questions.explanation: EA translates vision and strategy into coordinated change across enterprise structures.
questions.questionZh: 数字战略要落实到流程、应用和数据责任变化时，EA 主要贡献是什么？
questions.answerZh: 把战略意图转化为协调一致的企业变革。
questions.memory: EA 把 strategy 变成 coordinated enterprise change。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项强调战略到变革；其他选项分别偏采购、ITIL 运维或单纯 BMC。

questions.question: Why is an architectural model usually selective rather than exhaustive?
options: It keeps decision-relevant structures and relationships
It keeps domains separate by removing cross-domain relations
It replaces implementation models with one high-level diagram
It records operational events so no abstraction is needed
questions.explanation: Architectural models abstract from reality to support understanding and decision-making.
questions.questionZh: 为什么 architectural model 通常是选择性抽象，而不是穷尽所有细节？
questions.answerZh: 因为它保留理解和决策所需的结构与关系。
questions.memory: Model = 抽象，不是复制现实所有细节。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现模型的抽象目的；其他选项否定关系、替代详细模型或取消抽象。

questions.question: An EA description is most likely to reduce a communication gap when it helps:
options: Business and IT discuss change with shared concepts
Programming languages compile the same software module
Customers and competitors agree on market positioning
Devices share the same network and peripheral settings
questions.explanation: EA helps bridge communication gaps between business and IT stakeholders.
questions.questionZh: EA description 在什么情况下最可能减少沟通鸿沟？
questions.answerZh: 帮助业务和 IT stakeholders 用共同概念讨论同一变化。
questions.memory: EA 是 business 和 IT 的共同语言。
questions.clue: communication gap in EA = business 和 IT 对话。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 EA 沟通目标；其他选项不是架构沟通问题。

questions.question: Why is communication needed throughout the architecture process?
options: Architecture decisions affect stakeholders across the lifecycle
Communication starts only after implementation decisions are complete
The process ends when the first high-level architecture view is approved
Technical detail removes the need for stakeholder discussion
questions.explanation: Architecture work spans idea, design, implementation, operation, and change, all involving stakeholders.
questions.questionZh: 为什么 architecture process 全程都需要沟通？
questions.answerZh: 因为架构决策会在设计、实现、运行和变更中持续影响 stakeholders。
questions.memory: Architecture process 是闭环，沟通贯穿始终。
questions.clue: throughout process = design + implementation + operation + change。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现架构过程的闭环；其他选项把沟通放得太晚或取消 stakeholder。

questions.question: A company starts EA because each branch performs the same order process differently, creating inconsistent costs and data. This is best classified as:
options: Internal driver for operational improvement
External driver from regulatory compliance
ArchiMate assessment of a motivation driver
Technology implementation event in migration planning
questions.explanation: Internal process inefficiency and inconsistency are internal drivers for EA.
questions.questionZh: 各分店同一订单流程做法不同，导致成本和数据不一致，因此启动 EA，这是什么？
questions.answerZh: 与运营优化相关的 internal driver。
questions.memory: 内部流程低效 = internal driver。
questions.clue: branch process inconsistency 是内部运营问题。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是内部驱动；其他选项分别是外部法规、ArchiMate motivation 或实施事件。

questions.question: A new regulation requires auditable handling of personal data. As an EA driver, this is best understood as:
options: An external pressure that may force architecture change
An internal optimization issue caused by duplicate processes
A business function in the ArchiMate business layer
A CMMI level indicating quantitative process control
questions.explanation: Regulation is an external pressure that can require architecture changes.
questions.questionZh: 新法规要求个人数据处理可审计，作为 EA driver 应如何理解？
questions.answerZh: 可能迫使架构变化的外部压力。
questions.memory: law/regulation = external driver。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是外部驱动；其他选项混淆内部优化、ArchiMate 或 CMMI。

questions.question: A customer-service strategy is announced, but employee training, incentives, and daily work instructions remain unchanged. This is mainly a weakness in:
options: Vertical alignment
Horizontal alignment
Application-technology alignment
Platform-specific modelling
questions.explanation: Vertical alignment concerns the relation between top strategy and people at the bottom.
questions.questionZh: 客户服务战略发布后，培训、激励和日常工作没有变化，这主要是哪方面弱？
questions.answerZh: Vertical alignment。
questions.memory: Vertical = top strategy 到 bottom people。
questions.clue: top strategy 没有落实到 people。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是纵向对齐；horizontal 更偏内部流程和外部客户。

questions.question: A refund process is internally convenient for the company but creates long waiting times for customers. This is mainly a weakness in:
options: Horizontal alignment
Vertical alignment
MDA abstraction mapping
COBIT maturity assessment
questions.explanation: Horizontal alignment concerns internal processes and external customers.
questions.questionZh: 退款流程对公司内部方便，但客户等待时间很长，这主要是哪方面弱？
questions.answerZh: Horizontal alignment。
questions.memory: Horizontal = internal process 到 external customer。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是横向对齐；vertical 才是战略到人员执行。

questions.question: The operating model concept is mainly about deciding the required level of:
options: Business process integration and standardization
Service incidents and support escalation
Model abstraction and platform-specific transformation
Stakeholder awareness and commitment
questions.explanation: Operating models are based on integration and standardization of business processes.
questions.questionZh: Operating model 主要是在决定什么水平？
questions.answerZh: 业务流程整合和标准化的水平。
questions.memory: Operating model = integration + standardization。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 operating model；其他选项分别对应 ITIL、MDA 和 EA communication。

questions.question: Which situation most directly calls for a Balanced Scorecard rather than a Business Model Canvas?
options: Tracking strategy with financial, customer, process, and learning measures
Describing segments, channels, partners, costs, and revenue streams
Classifying artefacts by what, how, where, who, when, and why dimensions matrix
Modelling activities through inputs, outputs, controls, and mechanisms
questions.explanation: BSC translates strategy into measures across four perspectives; BMC describes a business model.
questions.questionZh: 哪种情况最直接需要 BSC，而不是 BMC？
questions.answerZh: 用财务、客户、流程和学习指标追踪战略。
questions.memory: BSC = 财客内学。
questions.clue: BSC = strategy measures；BMC = business model elements。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 BSC；其他选项分别是 BMC、Zachman 和 IDEF0。

questions.question: Which situation most directly calls for a Business Model Canvas rather than a Balanced Scorecard?
options: Explaining value proposition, customers, channels, costs, and revenues
Measuring strategy through financial, customer, process, and learning indicators
Assessing IT control objectives against business risks and control needs
Checking architecture views for consistency against stakeholder concerns
questions.explanation: BMC describes how a business creates and captures value.
questions.questionZh: 哪种情况最直接需要 BMC，而不是 BSC？
questions.answerZh: 解释客户群、价值主张、渠道和收入流如何配合。
questions.memory: BMC = value proposition + customers + costs/revenues。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 BMC；其他选项分别对应 BSC、COBIT 和 ISO 42010。

questions.question: Business architecture is most useful when strategic objectives must be connected to:
options: Business capabilities, processes, roles, and tactical needs
Physical network devices, server locations, and deployment nodes
Incident categories, service queues, and support escalation paths
Source-code classes, database indexes, and implementation packages
questions.explanation: Business architecture translates strategy into a shared understanding of business structure and action.
questions.questionZh: Business architecture 最适合把战略目标连接到什么？
questions.answerZh: 业务能力、流程、角色和战术需求。
questions.memory: Business architecture = strategy -> action 的业务蓝图。
questions.clue: business architecture connects strategy to business action。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现业务架构；其他选项分别偏技术、ITIL 运维或软件实现。

questions.question: Which feature would make an EA description least useful for decision-making?
options: Conflicting meanings for the same business concept
Traceable links from processes to supporting applications
Stakeholder concerns represented by suitable views
Clear principles that guide enterprise change decisions
questions.explanation: Inconsistent meanings undermine communication and decision-making.
questions.questionZh: 哪种特征会让 EA description 对决策最没用？
questions.answerZh: 不同图对同一业务概念使用冲突含义。
questions.memory: Good EA = clear + consistent + business-aligned。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项指出语义不一致；其他选项都是好 EA 的特征。

questions.question: Which comparison best distinguishes EFQM from ISO 9001 in this course?
options: Broad organizational excellence and continuous improvement
Certification of documented quality procedures and audits
Notation for modelling activity sequences and process flows
Maturity assessment of software development capability
questions.explanation: EFQM is broader than ISO 9001 and supports performance excellence and continuous improvement.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最能区分 EFQM 和 ISO 9001？
questions.answerZh: EFQM 范围更广，关注组织卓越和持续改进。
questions.memory: ISO 偏质量体系；EFQM 偏整体卓越。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项强调 EFQM 的整体绩效卓越；其他选项把 EFQM 误当成 ISO、BPMN 或 CMMI。

questions.question: In EFQM, which distinction is most accurate?
options: Enablers describe practices; results describe outcomes
Enablers describe revenues; results describe deployments
Enablers describe software classes; results describe UML links
Enablers describe incidents; results describe support queues
questions.explanation: EFQM enablers cover what an organization does; results cover what it achieves.
questions.questionZh: EFQM 中哪种区分最准确？
questions.answerZh: Enablers 描述组织做什么；results 描述组织取得什么。
questions.memory: Enablers = 做了什么；Results = 得到什么。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现 EFQM 九项逻辑；其他选项混入 BMC、UML 或 ITIL。

questions.question: A firm uses one tool to select strategic objectives and another to benchmark organizational performance against best practices. Which pairing is most accurate?
options: BSC for strategy; EFQM for benchmarking and improvement
EFQM for customer segments; BSC for enterprise data modelling
COBIT for value propositions; ITIL for society-result measures
BPMN for strategy maps; UML for financial performance indicators
questions.explanation: BSC supports strategic management, while EFQM supports benchmarking and continuous improvement.
questions.questionZh: 企业用一个工具选择战略目标，用另一个按最佳实践标杆比较绩效，哪组最准确？
questions.answerZh: BSC 用于战略目标；EFQM 用于标杆比较和改进。
questions.memory: BSC 管战略；EFQM 管卓越改进。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项区分 BSC 和 EFQM；其他选项把不同框架乱配。

questions.question: Which need most clearly points to COBIT rather than ITIL?
options: Defining IT control objectives linked to business risks and governance
Designing the detailed workflow for incident resolution and service support
Drawing a customer refund process with gateways and activities
Mapping value propositions to customer channels and revenue streams
questions.explanation: COBIT is an IT governance and control framework; ITIL focuses on service management practices.
questions.questionZh: 哪种需求最清楚指向 COBIT，而不是 ITIL？
questions.answerZh: 定义与业务风险和治理相关的 IT 控制目标。
questions.memory: COBIT = governance + control objectives + risk。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 COBIT；其他选项分别更像 ITIL、BPMN 和 BMC。

questions.question: Which option is a COBIT process domain rather than a BMC element, IDEF0 element, or MDA level?
options: Build, Acquire and Implement
Customer Segments and Channels
Activity, Control and Mechanism
Computation-Independent Model
questions.explanation: Build, Acquire and Implement is COBIT's BAI domain.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项是 COBIT 流程域，而不是 BMC、IDEF0 或 MDA 概念？
questions.answerZh: Build, Acquire and Implement。
questions.memory: COBIT 五域：EDM, APO, BAI, DSS, MEA。
questions.clue: BAI 是 COBIT 域；其他选项分别属于 BMC、IDEF0、MDA。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 COBIT 五域之一；干扰项都来自相近课程概念。

questions.question: Which statement best captures the COBIT-ITIL relationship?
options: COBIT frames governance; ITIL gives service practices
COBIT models flows; ITIL classifies architecture artefacts
COBIT defines customer segments; ITIL defines value propositions
COBIT gives PIM models; ITIL gives platform-specific models
questions.explanation: COBIT tells what should be governed or controlled; ITIL gives practices for running IT services.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最准确概括 COBIT 与 ITIL 的关系？
questions.answerZh: COBIT 给治理和控制目标；ITIL 给服务管理实践。
questions.memory: COBIT = what to control；ITIL = how to run service。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项区分治理框架和服务管理实践；其他选项混入 BPMN/Zachman/BMC/MDA。

questions.question: Which situation best illustrates the CMMI 'Defined' maturity idea?
options: Projects follow organization-wide standard processes and guidelines
Each project invents its own process without documented standards
The organization defines customer segments and revenue streams
The service desk handles incidents but no process maturity is assessed
questions.explanation: CMMI Level 3 Defined involves organization-wide standard processes.
questions.questionZh: 哪种情况最能体现 CMMI 的 Defined 成熟度思想？
questions.answerZh: 项目遵循组织级标准流程和指南。
questions.memory: Level 3 = Defined = 组织级标准流程。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项对应 CMMI Level 3；其他选项分别是低成熟度、BMC 或 ITIL 场景。

questions.question: A team checks whether architecture views address stakeholder concerns and remain mutually consistent. Which standard area is most relevant?
options: Architecture description practices in ISO/IEC 42010
Business model structure and value capture in BMC
Service support and incident handling practices in ITIL
Platform-independent to platform-specific transformation in MDA
questions.explanation: ISO/IEC 42010 concerns architecture descriptions, stakeholders, concerns, views, and viewpoints.
questions.questionZh: 团队检查架构 views 是否回应 stakeholder concerns 且相互一致，最相关的是哪个标准领域？
questions.answerZh: ISO/IEC 42010 的 architecture description practices。
questions.memory: 42010 = architecture description 术语体系。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项对应 architecture description；其他选项属于 BMC、ITIL 或 MDA。

questions.question: Which statement most accurately contrasts Zachman with TOGAF?
options: Zachman classifies descriptions; TOGAF provides ADM
Zachman manages incidents; TOGAF models value propositions
Zachman defines CIM/PIM/PSM; TOGAF defines IDEF0 controls
Zachman is a BPMN notation; TOGAF is a UML diagram category
questions.explanation: Zachman is a classification framework, while TOGAF's ADM is an iterative method.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最准确对比 Zachman 和 TOGAF？
questions.answerZh: Zachman 分类架构描述；TOGAF 提供迭代开发方法。
questions.memory: Zachman = 六问矩阵。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项抓住本质区别；其他选项混入 ITIL、BMC、MDA、IDEF、BPMN 和 UML。

questions.question: Which pairing correctly matches the framework with its central idea?
options: TOGAF - ADM; MDA - CIM/PIM/PSM; Zachman - classification matrix
TOGAF - customer segments; MDA - service support; Zachman - incident records
TOGAF - IDEF0 controls; MDA - COBIT domains; Zachman - BSC measures
TOGAF - data object; MDA - business actor; Zachman - technology node
questions.explanation: TOGAF centers on ADM, MDA on abstraction levels, and Zachman on classification.
questions.questionZh: 哪组正确匹配框架及其核心思想？
questions.answerZh: TOGAF-ADM；MDA-CIM/PIM/PSM；Zachman-classification matrix。
questions.memory: TOGAF-ADM；MDA-CIM/PIM/PSM。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项把三个框架的核心抓准；其他选项把不同章节概念交叉混淆。

questions.question: A framework is useful for asking what, how, where, who, when, and why, but it gives little guidance on execution sequence. Which is it?
options: Zachman Framework
TOGAF ADM
ITIL Service Support
ArchiMate implementation concepts
questions.explanation: Zachman classifies artefacts using interrogatives but is not a step-by-step method.
questions.questionZh: 某框架适合问 what/how/where/who/when/why，但很少指导执行顺序，这是哪个？
questions.answerZh: Zachman Framework。
questions.memory: Zachman 分类；TOGAF 做流程。
questions.clue: 六问 + 不是步骤方法 = Zachman。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 Zachman；TOGAF ADM 才强调执行过程。

questions.question: Which description best fits TOGAF ADM?
options: An iterative method for enterprise architecture development
A classification matrix without an architecture development cycle
A notation for detailed business process flow diagrams and hand-offs
A maturity scale for software process capability assessment
questions.explanation: TOGAF ADM is an iterative method for architecture development.
questions.questionZh: 哪种描述最符合 TOGAF ADM？
questions.answerZh: 用于开发和治理企业架构的迭代方法。
questions.memory: ADM = iterative development process。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 TOGAF；其他选项分别是 Zachman、BPMN 和 CMMI。

questions.question: A diagram represents a function with incoming information, outgoing results, governing rules, and resources used to perform it. Which method is most likely?
options: IDEF0
BPMN
IDEF1X
Zachman
questions.explanation: IDEF0 models functions using input, output, control, and mechanism around an activity.
questions.questionZh: 图中一个功能有输入信息、输出结果、规则约束和执行资源，最可能是什么方法？
questions.answerZh: IDEF0。
questions.memory: IDEF0 五件套：AICOM。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 IDEF0；BPMN 偏流程，IDEF1X 偏数据，Zachman 是分类框架。

questions.question: Which mapping is accurate for the core IDEF methods?
options: IDEF0 for functions, IDEF3 for process workflows, IDEF1X for data models
IDEF0 for data models, IDEF3 for control objectives, IDEF1X for service support
IDEF0 for strategy maps, IDEF3 for customer segments, IDEF1X for value propositions
IDEF0 for platform models, IDEF3 for application components, IDEF1X for business actors
questions.explanation: IDEF0 is functional, IDEF3 is process-oriented, and IDEF1X is data-oriented.
questions.questionZh: IDEF 核心方法哪组映射准确？
questions.answerZh: IDEF0 功能；IDEF3 流程工作流；IDEF1X 数据模型。
questions.memory: 0 功能，3 流程，1X 数据。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项区分 IDEF 家族；其他选项把 COBIT、ITIL、BMC、ArchiMate 混进来。

questions.question: Which modelling need points most directly to BPMN?
options: Showing sequence, decisions, and hand-offs in a process
Showing physical hosting of application artefacts on devices
Showing semantic meanings of customer and order symbols
Showing enterprise artefacts in a what-how-where matrix
questions.explanation: BPMN is designed for business process modelling.
questions.questionZh: 哪种建模需求最直接指向 BPMN？
questions.answerZh: 展示业务流程中的顺序、决策和交接。
questions.memory: BPMN = business process flow。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 BPMN；其他选项对应技术层、语义模型或 Zachman。

questions.question: Which question is least appropriate for BPMN as the primary modelling language?
options: Which technology nodes host the application services?
Which task follows customer payment?
Where does a process split into alternative paths?
Which role receives the next activity in the workflow?
questions.explanation: BPMN models business processes, not technology infrastructure hosting.
questions.questionZh: 哪类问题最不适合用 BPMN 作为主要建模语言？
questions.answerZh: 哪些技术节点承载应用服务。
questions.memory: BPMN 不管 technology deployment。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项属于 ArchiMate 技术/应用层关系；其他选项都是流程问题。

questions.question: Which need points most directly to UML rather than BPMN or BMC?
options: Software structures and interactions among system components
Customer segments, channels, partners, and revenue relationships
Organizational excellence criteria and performance results
IT governance controls, risk needs, and control objectives
questions.explanation: UML is primarily used for modelling software/system structures and behaviours.
questions.questionZh: 哪种需求最直接指向 UML，而不是 BPMN 或 BMC？
questions.answerZh: 建模软件结构和系统组件之间的交互。
questions.memory: UML = software/system modelling。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 UML；其他选项分别是 BMC、EFQM 和 COBIT。

questions.question: Why may UML be less effective for some business stakeholders?
options: It assumes software and object-oriented design knowledge
It cannot express structural relationships between elements
It is mainly for financial performance measurement
It is identical to a high-level business model canvas
questions.explanation: UML can be difficult for business stakeholders because it is oriented toward system designers.
questions.questionZh: 为什么 UML 对一些业务 stakeholder 可能不够有效？
questions.answerZh: 它通常假设读者熟悉软件和面向对象系统设计。
questions.memory: UML 给技术人清楚，业务人未必直观。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项说明 UML 的受众问题；其他选项不是 UML 的真实特点。

questions.question: What is the main EA limitation shared by IDEF, BPMN, and UML?
options: Useful in domains but weak for integrated EA views
Unable to describe processes, systems, functions, or data
Governance frameworks for IT control objectives
Benchmarking models for organizational excellence
questions.explanation: These languages are useful but do not fully integrate domains for enterprise architecture.
questions.questionZh: IDEF、BPMN、UML 在 EA 中的共同主要限制是什么？
questions.answerZh: 它们在各自领域有用，但跨领域集成视图较弱。
questions.memory: 这些语言各管一块，跨域弱。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项解释为什么需要更统一的 EA language；其他选项夸大或混淆 COBIT/EFQM。

questions.question: A model must show a customer-facing business process, the application service supporting it, and the infrastructure hosting the application. Which language best fits?
options: ArchiMate
BPMN alone
IDEF1X alone
Balanced Scorecard
questions.explanation: ArchiMate can connect business, application, and technology layers.
questions.questionZh: 模型要同时展示客户业务流程、支撑应用服务和承载基础设施，最适合什么？
questions.answerZh: ArchiMate。
questions.memory: 跨 business/application/technology 用 ArchiMate。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 ArchiMate；BPMN/IDEF1X/BSC 都覆盖不了跨层关系。

questions.question: A process model, application model, and data model exist separately, but changes cannot be traced between them. What is the core EA problem?
options: Weak integration between architecture domains
Missing customer segments in the business model
Missing financial measures in the strategy scorecard
Missing incident categories in service support
questions.explanation: EA needs integration across business, application, data, and technology domains.
questions.questionZh: 流程、应用、数据模型各自存在，但变化不能相互追踪，核心 EA 问题是什么？
questions.answerZh: 架构领域之间集成薄弱。
questions.memory: Domain integration = 变化能跨业务/应用/数据/技术追踪。
questions.clue: separate models + cannot trace changes = domain integration problem。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是领域集成问题；其他选项属于 BMC、BSC 或 ITIL。

questions.question: Why is the UML-BPMN integration issue a business-IT alignment issue?
options: Business process views may not connect to system design views
Financial and customer measures may not balance in strategy maps
Value propositions may not connect to channels and revenue streams
Incidents may not be assigned to service support roles
questions.explanation: BPMN often represents business processes, while UML often represents software/system design.
questions.questionZh: 为什么 UML-BPMN 集成问题是 business-IT alignment 问题？
questions.answerZh: 因为它关系到业务流程视图能否连接系统设计视图。
questions.memory: BPMN 业务流程；UML 系统设计；连不上就是 business-IT 问题。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项连接业务与 IT；其他选项分别是 BSC、BMC 或 ITIL。

questions.question: Compositionality is most useful in EA because it helps architects:
options: Understand complex systems through parts and relationships
Ignore relationships so that each model remains independent
Convert all models into service-desk tickets
Replace stakeholder concerns with financial measures
questions.explanation: Compositionality manages complexity by identifying parts and their relations.
questions.questionZh: Compositionality 在 EA 中为什么有用？
questions.answerZh: 帮助通过组成部分和关系理解复杂系统。
questions.memory: 先拆部件，再看关系。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项强调分解和关系；其他选项破坏 EA 集成目标。

questions.question: Which statement best distinguishes a view from a viewpoint?
options: A view is the representation; a viewpoint defines conventions
A view defines rules; a viewpoint is the stakeholder diagram
A view is a database object; a viewpoint is an application component
A view is only technical; a viewpoint is only financial
questions.explanation: A view is a representation; a viewpoint defines conventions for creating and interpreting that kind of representation.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最能区分 view 和 viewpoint？
questions.answerZh: view 是具体表达；viewpoint 定义这类 view 如何构建和解释。
questions.memory: View 是图；Viewpoint 是画图和读图规则。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项区分结果和规则；其他选项反了或混入无关概念。

questions.question: Two models use the term 'customer', but one means registered users and the other means paying buyers. What is missing?
options: Shared semantic interpretation of the symbolic model
COBIT delivery and support domain for IT service management
Balanced Scorecard measure for financial performance
Physical device or deployment node in the technology layer
questions.explanation: Semantic models clarify the meaning of symbols used in symbolic models.
questions.questionZh: 两个模型都用 customer，但一个指注册用户，一个指付款买家，缺少什么？
questions.answerZh: 对符号模型的共享语义解释。
questions.memory: Symbolic 是符号；Semantic 是符号含义。
questions.clue: same symbol, different meaning = semantic issue。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 semantic interpretation；其他选项与语义歧义无关。

questions.question: A common architectural language is valuable mainly because it:
options: Reduces ambiguity and links models across domains
Forces all stakeholders to read one low-level diagram
Removes the need for viewpoints and stakeholder concerns
Turns business models directly into executable code
questions.explanation: A common language supports consistent modelling, communication, and integration.
questions.questionZh: 共同 architecture language 的主要价值是什么？
questions.answerZh: 减少歧义，并支持不同领域模型之间的关系。
questions.memory: Common language = less ambiguity + integration。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现共同语言价值；其他选项误解为单一低层图、取消 viewpoint 或自动代码生成。

questions.question: In a modelling language, the way of communicating is mainly about:
options: How concepts are represented for human understanding
How IT controls are audited against business risks and needs
How customer segments are priced in business revenue models
How software processes reach defined maturity level three
questions.explanation: The way of communicating concerns the notation and representation of modelling concepts.
questions.questionZh: 建模语言中的 way of communicating 主要关注什么？
questions.answerZh: 概念如何被表示出来以便人理解。
questions.memory: Communicating = 怎么把模型讲给人看。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项对应表示和沟通；其他选项属于 COBIT、BMC 或 CMMI。

questions.question: Which need best fits the way of supporting in an architecture language?
options: Tool support for creating, analysing, and updating models
Definition of customer relationships, channels, and revenue
Quantitative process-control maturity assessment
Classification of artefacts by interrogative questions
questions.explanation: A way of supporting often comes through tools supporting model work.
questions.questionZh: 哪种需求最符合 architecture language 中的 way of supporting？
questions.answerZh: 支持创建、分析、存储和更新模型的工具。
questions.memory: Supporting = 工具支持。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是工具支持；其他选项属于 BMC、CMMI 或 Zachman。

questions.question: Architecture communication support is successful when it:
options: Shows relevant architecture aspects for stakeholder concerns
Shows every model element at maximum technical detail
Prevents stakeholders from challenging architecture assumptions
Replaces architecture rationale with performance indicators
questions.explanation: Communication support should provide relevant views for stakeholder concerns.
questions.questionZh: 架构沟通支持什么时候算成功？
questions.answerZh: 让每类 stakeholder 看到与其 concern 相关的架构方面。
questions.memory: Communication support = 给对的人看相关 view。
questions.clue: communication support = relevant view for concern。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现按关注点沟通；其他选项信息过载或取消沟通。

questions.question: Change support matters in EA mainly because:
options: Changes can affect processes, applications, data, and technology
Architecture elements are independent and do not affect each other
Change support means segmenting customers and pricing channels
Impact assessment is unnecessary after initial model approval
questions.explanation: Architecture changes can propagate across domains and should be assessed.
questions.questionZh: 为什么 EA 中 change support 很重要？
questions.answerZh: 因为一个领域的变化可能影响相关流程、应用、数据和技术。
questions.memory: EA 变化有连锁影响，要 impact assessment。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项强调连锁影响；其他选项否认 EA 的关联性。

questions.question: EA communication is most successful when stakeholders move from merely seeing a model to:
options: Shared understanding, agreement, and commitment to act
Ignoring concerns because the architecture diagram is complete
Replacing architecture models with service incident reports
Treating business and technology views as unrelated artefacts
questions.explanation: EA communication aims at awareness, agreement, and commitment around architecture knowledge.
questions.questionZh: EA 沟通什么时候最成功？
questions.answerZh: stakeholders 从看到模型走向共同理解、同意并承诺行动。
questions.memory: Communication = understanding -> agreement -> commitment。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现 EA 沟通目标；其他选项不支持架构理解。

questions.question: Which sequence best represents increasing commitment to architecture knowledge?
options: Aware -> Agreed -> Committed
Committed -> Aware -> Agreed
Input -> Control -> Mechanism
CIM -> DSS -> BAI
questions.explanation: Knowledge states progress from awareness to agreement to commitment.
questions.questionZh: 哪一序列最能表示对架构知识承诺程度逐步增强？
questions.answerZh: Aware -> Agreed -> Committed。
questions.memory: 知道 -> 同意 -> 承诺行动。
questions.clue: 先知道，再同意，再承诺行动。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是知识状态顺序；其他选项顺序错误或混入 IDEF0/COBIT。

questions.question: Which technique is best when an architect needs to discover how an experienced employee actually performs a task?
options: Elicitation interview
Committing review
Mass mailing
Platform-specific modelling
questions.explanation: Elicitation interviews gather knowledge from informants.
questions.questionZh: 架构师想发现有经验员工实际如何完成任务，最适合什么？
questions.answerZh: Elicitation interview。
questions.memory: Elicitation = 从人那里挖知识。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是知识收集；committing review 是选方案，mailing 是大范围发送。

questions.question: Which technique is best when a model already exists and the architect wants to check whether it matches an informant's understanding?
options: Validation interview
Elicitation interview
Business Model Canvas
COBIT maturity assessment
questions.explanation: Validation interviews check whether a view or model matches expectations.
questions.questionZh: 已有模型后，架构师想检查它是否符合 informant 的理解，最适合什么？
questions.answerZh: Validation interview。
questions.memory: Validation = 检查模型对不对。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是验证访谈；elicitation 更偏从零收集知识。

questions.question: Which situation best calls for a committing review?
options: Stakeholders compare alternatives and commit to one option
One employee explains undocumented tasks to an analyst
A model is mailed to a broad audience for information only
A process flow is transformed into a relational data model
questions.explanation: Committing reviews ask stakeholders to select and commit to an alternative.
questions.questionZh: 哪种情况最需要 committing review？
questions.answerZh: stakeholders 比较多个架构方案并承诺其中一个。
questions.memory: Committing review = 选方案并承诺。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现承诺评审；其他选项是访谈、mailing 或数据建模。

questions.question: Why is ArchiMate better suited than isolated BPMN or UML diagrams for EA integration?
options: It relates business, application, and technology layers
It is limited to workflow inside one business process
It only models object-oriented software classes
It measures strategic performance with scorecard indicators
questions.explanation: ArchiMate integrates layers and relations across EA domains.
questions.questionZh: 为什么 ArchiMate 比孤立 BPMN 或 UML 图更适合 EA 集成？
questions.answerZh: 它能表示业务、应用和技术层之间的关系。
questions.memory: ArchiMate = 跨层集成语言。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是跨层关系；其他选项分别描述 BPMN、UML 或 BSC。

questions.question: Which mapping is most accurate in an ArchiMate layered model?
options: Ordering process-business; order system-application; server-technology
Ordering process-technology; order system-business; cloud server-motivation
Customer segment-application; value proposition-technology; revenue-data
Incident ticket-business; service queue-MDA; platform model-technology
questions.explanation: ArchiMate separates business processes, applications, and technology infrastructure into different layers.
questions.questionZh: ArchiMate 分层模型中哪组映射最准确？
questions.answerZh: 客户下单流程-业务层；订单管理系统-应用层；云服务器-技术层。
questions.memory: 流程=Business；应用=Application；基础设施=Technology。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项准确对应三层；其他选项故意混淆 BMC、ITIL 和 MDA。

questions.question: In ArchiMate motivation concepts, a regulation that pushes an organization to improve privacy controls is best modelled as:
options: A driver
A node
An application component
A business role
questions.explanation: A driver is an internal or external condition that motivates change.
questions.questionZh: 在 ArchiMate motivation concepts 中，推动组织改善隐私控制的法规最好建模为什么？
questions.answerZh: Driver。
questions.memory: Driver 推动 goal/change。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 driver；node 是技术层，application component 是应用层，business role 是业务结构。

questions.question: Which option best describes an ArchiMate application component?
options: Modular and replaceable application functionality
Person or organization assigned to business behaviour
Physical resource that hosts software artefacts
High-level intent motivating architecture change
questions.explanation: An application component encapsulates application functionality and is modular and replaceable.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最准确描述 ArchiMate application component？
questions.answerZh: 模块化、可替换或复用的应用功能单元。
questions.memory: Application component = 模块化应用功能。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项属于应用层；其他选项分别是 business actor/role、technology node 或 motivation goal/driver。

questions.question: In migration planning, what is the difference between a plateau and a gap?
options: Plateau is a stable state; gap is the difference between states
Plateau is an activity; gap is the mechanism that performs it
Plateau is a customer group; gap is the revenue it produces later
Plateau is a UML diagram; gap is a COBIT control objective
questions.explanation: Plateaus represent architecture states; gaps represent differences between plateaus.
questions.questionZh: migration planning 中 plateau 和 gap 的区别是什么？
questions.answerZh: plateau 是相对稳定的架构状态；gap 是这些状态之间的差异。
questions.memory: Plateau 是状态；Gap 是状态之间差距。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 ArchiMate migration concepts；其他选项混入 IDEF0、BMC、UML/COBIT。

questions.question: Which set contains only EFQM enablers rather than results?
options: Leadership, strategy, people, partnerships and resources, processes
Customer results, people results, society results, business results
Financial, customer, internal process, learning and growth
Evaluate/direct/monitor, align/plan/organise, build/acquire/implement
questions.explanation: EFQM enablers describe what the organization does; results describe what it achieves.
questions.questionZh: 哪组只包含 EFQM enablers，而不是 results？
questions.answerZh: Leadership、strategy、people、partnerships and resources、processes。
questions.memory: EFQM enablers = 领战人资流。
questions.clue: enablers 是组织做什么；results 是组织取得什么。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 EFQM 五个 enablers；其他选项分别是 EFQM results、BSC 四视角和 COBIT 域。

questions.question: Which statement best explains how EFQM supports performance improvement?
options: It provides measures and indicators for benchmarking and improvement
It specifies documented quality procedures for certification and audit review
It models business process hand-offs using events, tasks, and gateways
It defines platform-independent and platform-specific software model mappings
questions.explanation: EFQM uses measurements, benchmarking, learning, innovation, and improvement.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最能说明 EFQM 如何支持绩效改进？
questions.answerZh: 它提供用于标杆比较和持续改进的衡量指标。
questions.memory: EFQM = performance measurement + benchmarking + improvement。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项对应 EFQM；其他选项分别更像 ISO 9001、BPMN 和 MDA。

questions.question: Which activity is most closely associated with ITIL Service Support?
options: Incident management
Value proposition design
Zachman cell classification
CIM-to-PIM transformation
questions.explanation: Incident management is a classic ITIL Service Support practice.
questions.questionZh: 哪项活动最接近 ITIL Service Support？
questions.answerZh: Incident management。
questions.memory: ITIL Service Support 常见 incident management。
questions.clue: service support = incident/problem/change/service desk 等运维支持实践。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 ITIL；其他选项分别属于 BMC、Zachman 和 MDA。

questions.question: Which concern fits ITIL Service Delivery better than COBIT control objectives?
options: Managing service levels, availability, and IT service continuity
Classifying enterprise artefacts into what/how/where cells
Describing inputs, outputs, controls, and mechanisms of a function
Assessing organizational excellence using enablers and results
questions.explanation: ITIL Service Delivery includes service-level, availability, continuity, financial, and capacity management.
questions.questionZh: 哪种关注点更符合 ITIL Service Delivery，而不是 COBIT control objectives？
questions.answerZh: 管理服务等级、可用性和 IT 服务连续性。
questions.memory: ITIL Service Delivery = service level / availability / continuity。
questions.clue: service-level、availability、continuity 是 ITIL 服务交付词汇。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 ITIL；其他选项分别对应 Zachman、IDEF0 和 EFQM。

questions.question: Why are COBIT and ITIL complementary rather than mutually exclusive?
options: COBIT defines governance/control objectives; ITIL gives practices
COBIT and ITIL both define customer segments, channels, and revenue streams
COBIT replaces ITIL because service support is outside governance work
ITIL replaces COBIT because control objectives are only software diagrams
questions.explanation: COBIT frames what should be controlled; ITIL describes how IT service practices can implement it.
questions.questionZh: 为什么 COBIT 和 ITIL 是互补的，而不是互斥的？
questions.answerZh: COBIT 定义治理/控制目标，ITIL 提供实现 IT 服务的实践。
questions.memory: COBIT what；ITIL how。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项说明互补关系；其他选项错误地把二者等同或替代。

questions.question: Which set belongs to TOGAF's Architecture Content Framework?
options: Business, data, application, and technology architecture
What, how, where, who, when, and why dimensions
Activity, input, output, control, and mechanism elements
Aware, agreed, and committed knowledge states
questions.explanation: TOGAF content considers enterprise architecture as business, data, application, and technology architectures.
questions.questionZh: 哪组属于 TOGAF Architecture Content Framework？
questions.answerZh: Business、data、application、technology architecture。
questions.memory: TOGAF 内容四架构：BDAT。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 TOGAF；其他选项分别是 Zachman、IDEF0 和 Lecture 6 沟通知识状态。

questions.question: Which statement best describes a symbolic model?
options: It is a syntactic structure using symbols for elements and relations
It is the real-world organization and operations that the model refers to
It is a service-management procedure for handling incidents and support
It is a scorecard perspective for measuring learning and growth
questions.explanation: A symbolic model is a syntactic representation using symbols and relations.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最准确描述 symbolic model？
questions.answerZh: 它是用符号表示模型元素和关系的语法结构。
questions.memory: Symbolic = syntax / symbols。
questions.clue: symbolic model 先看符号结构，不等于现实本身。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项强调语法和符号；其他选项是现实对象、ITIL 或 BSC。

questions.question: Which statement best describes a semantic model?
options: It interprets what symbols in a model mean and can add constraints
It chooses a colour scheme for visualizing architecture diagrams
It defines service levels for IT availability and continuity management
It lists the business model's channels, partners, and revenue streams
questions.explanation: Semantic models give meaning to symbolic models and may constrain interpretations.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最准确描述 semantic model？
questions.answerZh: 它解释模型符号的含义，并可加入约束。
questions.memory: Semantic = meaning / interpretation / constraints。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是语义模型；其他选项分别是可视化、ITIL 和 BMC。

questions.question: Two diagrams use the same graphical symbol but attach different meanings to it. Which distinction is most relevant?
options: Syntax may look the same while semantics differ
COBIT and ITIL are always identical
BSC and BMC use the same four perspectives
A plateau and a gap are the same migration concept
questions.explanation: Syntax concerns form; semantics concerns meaning.
questions.questionZh: 两个图使用相同图形符号，但赋予不同含义，最相关的区别是什么？
questions.answerZh: syntax 可能相同，但 semantics 不同。
questions.memory: Syntax = 形式；semantics = 含义。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项区分形式和含义；其他选项是错误等同。

questions.question: Why is visual integration alone insufficient for model integration?
options: Diagrams may look connected while meanings remain inconsistent
Visual diagrams always remove the need for stakeholder interpretation
Model integration only means using the same font and colour palette
Semantic consistency is relevant only to database normalization
questions.explanation: Model integration requires semantic consistency, not just visual similarity.
questions.questionZh: 为什么只做视觉上的整合不足以完成模型整合？
questions.answerZh: 因为图看起来连上了，但底层含义和约束仍可能不一致。
questions.memory: Integration 不只是看起来连上，还要 meaning 对得上。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项强调语义一致性；其他选项低估了 interpretation 和 constraints。

questions.question: When mapping BMC to ArchiMate, value proposition is most closely related to:
options: Value, goal, requirement, or business service concepts
Technology nodes and physical device deployment only
Incident queues and service-desk escalation paths only
CMMI maturity levels and quantitative control objectives only
questions.explanation: A BMC value proposition can be represented using ArchiMate motivation/business concepts such as value, goals, requirements, and services.
questions.questionZh: 把 BMC 映射到 ArchiMate 时，value proposition 最接近哪些概念？
questions.answerZh: Value、goal、requirement 或 business service 等概念。
questions.memory: Value proposition 可转成 ArchiMate 的 value/goal/service。
questions.clue: BMC value proposition 不是技术部署或 ITIL 事件。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项对应 motivation/business 概念；其他选项属于技术层、ITIL 或 CMMI。

questions.question: BMC key activities are most naturally represented in ArchiMate as:
options: Business processes or business functions
Technology nodes or system software only
Service support incidents and problem records
Financial measures in a Balanced Scorecard
questions.explanation: Key activities describe what the business does, so they map naturally to business processes/functions.
questions.questionZh: BMC 的 key activities 在 ArchiMate 中最自然映射为什么？
questions.answerZh: Business processes 或 business functions。
questions.memory: Key activities = business does -> process/function。
questions.clue: 活动是业务行为，不是技术节点。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项属于业务层；其他选项分别属于技术层、ITIL 和 BSC。

questions.question: Which distinction among ArchiMate strategy concepts is most accurate?
options: Capability is an ability, resource is an asset, and course of action is chosen action
Capability is a customer segment, resource is a revenue stream, and course of action is a cost structure
Capability is a UML class, resource is a BPMN event, and course of action is an IDEF0 control
Capability is a device, resource is a node, and course of action is system software
questions.explanation: In ArchiMate strategy concepts, capability means ability, resource means asset, and course of action means chosen direction/action.
questions.questionZh: ArchiMate strategy concepts 中 capability、resource、course of action 的区别哪项准确？
questions.answerZh: capability 是能力，resource 是资产，course of action 是企业决定采取的行动方向。
questions.memory: Capability 能力；Resource 资源；Course of action 做法。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 ArchiMate strategy；其他选项混入 BMC、UML/BPMN/IDEF0 或技术层。

questions.question: Which mapping of ArchiMate business concepts is most accurate?
options: Actor performs roles; service is external; process/function describe behaviour
Actor is a database table; role is a server; service is a CMMI maturity level
Actor is a value proposition; process is a revenue stream; function is a channel
Actor is a technology node; service is system software; process is a physical device
questions.explanation: Business actors, roles, services, processes, and functions are distinct business-layer concepts.
questions.questionZh: ArchiMate business concepts 哪组映射最准确？
questions.answerZh: actor 扮演 role；service 对外提供；process/function 描述业务行为。
questions.memory: Actor 谁；Role 职责；Service 给外部；Process/Function 做业务。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项属于业务层；其他选项混入数据库、CMMI、BMC 和技术层。

questions.question: Which distinction among ArchiMate motivation concepts is most accurate?
options: Driver creates pressure, assessment analyses a state, goal states intent, and requirement states a need
Driver is a technology node, assessment is a server, goal is system software, and requirement is a device
Driver is a BPMN gateway, assessment is a UML class, goal is an IDEF0 input, and requirement is an output
Driver is a revenue stream, assessment is a channel, goal is a partner, and requirement is a cost structure
questions.explanation: ArchiMate motivation concepts explain why change is needed and what must be achieved.
questions.questionZh: ArchiMate motivation concepts 中哪种区分最准确？
questions.answerZh: driver 产生压力，assessment 分析状态，goal 表达意图，requirement 表达必须满足的需要。
questions.memory: Driver 推动；Assessment 分析；Goal 目标；Requirement 需求。
questions.clue: motivation concepts 不是业务流程或技术部署。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 motivation 概念；其他选项分别混入技术层、BPMN/UML/IDEF0 和 BMC。

questions.question: Which description best matches an architecture-level description rather than an implementation-level description?
options: Key structures, relationships, and principles
Detailed source code, variables, and commits
Service queues, incidents, and support shifts
Invoices, purchase orders, and payment dates
questions.explanation: Architecture focuses on fundamental structure and principles, not every implementation detail.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项更像架构层面的描述，而不是实现层面的描述？
questions.answerZh: 塑造系统的关键元素、关系和原则。
questions.memory: Architecture 抓结构和原则，不抓所有细节。
questions.clue: 题干对比 architecture-level 与 implementation-level。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项强调结构、关系、原则；其他选项是代码细节、运维排班或财务记录。

questions.question: Which option best describes the scope of Enterprise Architecture?
options: Routers, servers, networks, hosting, and storage zones
Organization, processes, systems, and infrastructure
Database tables, indexes, keys, and records only
Financial ratios, budgets, and audit notes only
questions.explanation: EA connects organizational structure, processes, information systems, and infrastructure.
questions.questionZh: 哪一项最准确描述 Enterprise Architecture 的范围？
questions.answerZh: 组织、业务流程、信息系统和基础设施。
questions.memory: EA = organization + process + IS + infrastructure。
questions.clue: 题干问 scope，不是只问 IT 设备。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现 EA 的整体范围；其他选项把 EA 缩小成网络、数据库或财务。

questions.question: In EA work, an enterprise may be best understood as:
options: One software application and its database
Unrelated departments with no shared purpose
Organizations or units with shared goals
One temporary programming task
questions.explanation: The enterprise can be a broad organizational scope, not just a legal company or IT unit.
questions.questionZh: 在 EA 中，enterprise 最适合理解为什么？
questions.answerZh: 拥有共同目标的一个组织或多个组织集合。
questions.memory: Enterprise 看共同目标和边界，不等于 IT 部门。
questions.clue: 题干问 enterprise 本身的含义。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项强调组织范围和共同目标；其他选项过窄或没有共同目的。

questions.question: A concern in architecture description is best described as:
options: A code module implementing one feature
A process diagram with events and gateways
A performance result in EFQM reporting
A stakeholder interest or issue
questions.explanation: Concerns are stakeholder interests or issues that architecture descriptions should address.
questions.questionZh: architecture description 中的 concern 最准确是什么意思？
questions.answerZh: stakeholder 对系统持有的关注点、利益或问题。
questions.memory: Stakeholder 有 concern；view 回应 concern。
questions.clue: 题干只问 concern 的定义。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 stakeholder 的关注点；其他选项分别属于代码、BPMN 或 EFQM。

questions.question: Which activity belongs naturally to an architecture process rather than only to one-time documentation?
options: Designing, realizing, operating, and changing architecture
Drawing one diagram and never revisiting it
Removing stakeholder concerns after implementation and operational review
Choosing one notation and forbidding views
questions.explanation: Architecture work continues across design, realization, operation, and change.
questions.questionZh: 哪项更属于架构过程，而不是一次性文档工作？
questions.answerZh: 长期设计、实现、运行和变更架构。
questions.memory: Architecture process 是持续过程。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现架构生命周期；其他选项把架构误解成一次性画图。

questions.question: A driver in EA is best understood as:
options: A diagram shape in a deployment model
A condition that motivates architecture change
A final package delivered to end users with support documentation
A database key identifying one record
questions.explanation: Drivers are internal or external conditions that motivate change.
questions.questionZh: EA 中 driver 最适合理解为什么？
questions.answerZh: 推动架构变化的条件或压力。
questions.memory: Driver = pressure for change。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项说明 driver 的作用；其他选项混入 UML、软件交付和数据库。

questions.question: Which pairing of alignment concepts is most accurate?
options: Vertical links suppliers to revenue; horizontal links servers to devices too
Vertical links code to data; horizontal links strategy to employees
Vertical links strategy to people; horizontal links processes to customers
Vertical means compliance; horizontal means visualization
questions.explanation: Vertical alignment links top strategy to people below; horizontal alignment links internal processes with external customers.
questions.questionZh: 哪组对 vertical/horizontal alignment 的搭配最准确？
questions.answerZh: Vertical 连接战略与人员；horizontal 连接内部流程与客户。
questions.memory: Vertical 上下；Horizontal 内外。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项抓住两个方向；其他选项把概念换成供应商、代码或法规。

questions.question: Which set contains the four Balanced Scorecard perspectives?
options: Business, data, application, and technology
Driver, assessment, goal, and requirement
Input, output, control, and mechanism
Financial, customer, process, and learning
questions.explanation: BSC uses financial, customer, internal business process, and learning/growth perspectives.
questions.questionZh: 哪组是 Balanced Scorecard 的四个视角？
questions.answerZh: 财务、客户、内部流程、学习与成长。
questions.memory: BSC = 财客内学。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 BSC；其他选项分别属于 TOGAF/ArchiMate、motivation 或 IDEF0。

questions.question: Within a Balanced Scorecard perspective, which sequence best fits the course structure?
options: Goal, node, and device concepts
Mission, objectives, and measures
Actor, role, and service concepts
CIM, PIM, and PSM abstraction levels
questions.explanation: Each BSC perspective can be structured with mission, objectives, and measures.
questions.questionZh: 在 BSC 每个视角内部，哪一组结构最符合课程内容？
questions.answerZh: Mission、objectives、measures。
questions.memory: BSC 每个视角：使命、目标、指标。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 BSC 的内部结构；其他选项属于技术层、业务层或 MDA。

questions.question: Which set contains only Business Model Canvas elements?
options: Value proposition, channels, key partners, cost structure
Financial perspective, learning perspective, customer perspective, measures
Activity, input, output, control
Viewpoint, view, rationale, consistency
questions.explanation: Value proposition, channels, key partners, and cost structure are BMC elements.
questions.questionZh: 哪组只包含 Business Model Canvas 的元素？
questions.answerZh: Value proposition、channels、key partners、cost structure。
questions.memory: BMC 看价值、客户、渠道、伙伴、成本、收入等。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项来自 BMC；其他选项分别是 BSC、IDEF0 和 ISO 42010。

questions.question: Business architecture is mainly useful because it:
options: Describing router placement and cable layouts
Listing source-code classes inside applications and service planning
Linking strategic objectives with business demands
Replacing every quality-management framework
questions.explanation: Business architecture translates strategy into business structure and action.
questions.questionZh: Business architecture 主要为什么有用？
questions.answerZh: 连接战略目标与战术层面的业务需求。
questions.memory: Business architecture = strategy to action。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现业务架构的桥接作用；其他选项过窄或过度夸大。

questions.question: EFQM's nine criteria are commonly summarized as:
options: Five maturity levels and four service processes
Five enablers and four results
Three abstraction levels and six viewpoints
Four domains and five modelling languages
questions.explanation: EFQM has five enabler criteria and four result criteria.
questions.questionZh: EFQM 的九个 criteria 通常概括为什么？
questions.answerZh: 五个 enablers 和四个 results。
questions.memory: EFQM = 5 enablers + 4 results。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 EFQM 结构；其他选项混入 CMMI/ITIL、MDA/ISO 或其他框架。

questions.question: Which set correctly lists COBIT process domains?
options: EDM, APO, BAI, DSS, MEA
CIM, PIM, PSM, ADM, UOB
BSC, BMC, BPMN, UML, IDEF
Aware, agreed, committed, validated, mailed
questions.explanation: COBIT domains are Evaluate/Direct/Monitor, Align/Plan/Organise, Build/Acquire/Implement, Deliver/Service/Support, and Monitor/Evaluate/Assess.
questions.questionZh: 哪组正确列出 COBIT 的流程域？
questions.answerZh: EDM、APO、BAI、DSS、MEA。
questions.memory: COBIT 五域：EDM/APO/BAI/DSS/MEA。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 COBIT；其他选项混入 MDA、建模语言或沟通状态。

questions.question: Which sequence best matches the common COBIT maturity scale used in the course?
options: Aware, agreed, committed, reviewed, mailed
Initial, repeatable, defined, managed, optimized
Business, application, data, technology, motivation
Activity, input, output, control, mechanism
questions.explanation: The COBIT maturity levels run from initial through optimized.
questions.questionZh: 哪一序列最符合课程中 COBIT maturity scale？
questions.answerZh: Initial、repeatable、defined、managed、optimized。
questions.memory: 成熟度从混乱到优化。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是成熟度等级；其他选项是沟通状态、架构层或 IDEF0。

questions.question: The two major ITIL parts emphasized in the course are:
options: Service Delivery and Service Support
Business Architecture and Data Architecture
Leadership and Society Results
CIM and PSM
questions.explanation: The course presents ITIL around Service Delivery and Service Support.
questions.questionZh: 课程强调的 ITIL 两大部分是什么？
questions.answerZh: Service Delivery 和 Service Support。
questions.memory: ITIL = delivery + support。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 ITIL；其他选项分别属于 TOGAF、EFQM 和 MDA。

questions.question: Which sequence best matches the CMMI maturity levels?
options: Financial, customer, process, learning, business value, and growth
Initial, managed, defined, quantitatively managed, optimizing
Input, control, output, mechanism, and activity
Driver, assessment, goal, requirement, and outcome
questions.explanation: CMMI has five maturity levels from Initial to Optimizing.
questions.questionZh: 哪一序列最符合 CMMI 五级成熟度？
questions.answerZh: Initial、Managed、Defined、Quantitatively Managed、Optimizing。
questions.memory: CMMI 五级：初始、管理、定义、量化、优化。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 CMMI；其他选项来自 BSC、IDEF0 和 ArchiMate motivation。

questions.question: ISO/IEC 42010 is most closely related to:
options: Architecture descriptions, stakeholders, concerns, views, and viewpoints
Service-desk incident queues, escalation paths, and support records only
Customer segments, channels, and revenue streams only
Object-oriented inheritance and software classes only
questions.explanation: ISO/IEC 42010 defines key terms and practices for architecture description.
questions.questionZh: ISO/IEC 42010 最接近哪一类内容？
questions.answerZh: 架构描述、stakeholder、concern、view 和 viewpoint。
questions.memory: ISO 42010 = architecture description vocabulary。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项对应 ISO 42010；其他选项属于 ITIL、BMC 或 UML。

questions.question: TOGAF's Architecture Capability Framework is mainly about:
options: Establishing and governing architecture capability
Distinguishing inputs from mechanisms in IDEF0
Calculating revenue streams in a business model
Separating UML behaviour from implementation diagrams
questions.explanation: The capability framework concerns the organizational capability needed to practice architecture.
questions.questionZh: TOGAF Architecture Capability Framework 主要关注什么？
questions.answerZh: 组织如何建立和治理架构能力。
questions.memory: Capability Framework = 让组织具备做架构的能力。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 TOGAF 能力建设；其他选项属于 IDEF0、BMC 或 UML。

questions.question: The TOGAF Enterprise Continuum is best understood as:
options: Classifying architecture assets from generic to specific
Sorting ITIL incidents by urgency and service queue for reusable governance
Tracking EFQM society-result indicators only
Naming classes in object-oriented software diagrams
questions.explanation: Enterprise Continuum helps classify and reuse architecture assets across levels of specificity.
questions.questionZh: TOGAF Enterprise Continuum 最适合理解为什么？
questions.answerZh: 从通用到具体组织架构资产的分类和复用思路。
questions.memory: Continuum = architecture assets 从通用到具体。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项对应 TOGAF；其他选项属于 ITIL、EFQM 或 UML。

questions.question: Which option correctly distinguishes CIM, PIM, and PSM in MDA?
options: CIM hides computation; PIM hides platform; PSM adds platform details
CIM is a COBIT domain; PIM is ITIL; PSM is an EFQM result
CIM models incidents; PIM models service desks; PSM models revenue also
CIM is a stakeholder; PIM is a concern; PSM is a viewpoint
questions.explanation: MDA moves from computation-independent to platform-independent to platform-specific models.
questions.questionZh: MDA 中 CIM、PIM、PSM 的区别哪项正确？
questions.answerZh: CIM 隐藏计算，PIM 隐藏平台细节，PSM 加入特定平台细节。
questions.memory: MDA = CIM -> PIM -> PSM。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 MDA 三层；其他选项混入 COBIT、ITIL、EFQM 或 ISO 42010。

questions.question: Which set contains the main elements of an IDEF0 function model?
options: Activity, input, output, control, mechanism
Actor, role, service, interface, event
Goal, requirement, constraint, outcome, driver
Segment, channel, partner, cost, revenue
questions.explanation: IDEF0 uses activity with inputs, outputs, controls, and mechanisms.
questions.questionZh: 哪组是 IDEF0 功能模型的主要元素？
questions.answerZh: Activity、input、output、control、mechanism。
questions.memory: IDEF0 = AICOM。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 IDEF0；其他选项属于 ArchiMate 或 BMC。

questions.question: In IDEF3, UOB refers to:
options: Unit of Behaviour
Unified Object Boundary
User Operation Baseline
Universal Outcome Benchmark
questions.explanation: IDEF3 uses Units of Behaviour to describe process knowledge.
questions.questionZh: IDEF3 中 UOB 指什么？
questions.answerZh: Unit of Behaviour。
questions.memory: IDEF3 的 UOB = 行为单元。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 IDEF3 术语；其他选项是干扰缩写。

questions.question: Which pair best matches the two IDEF3 diagram types emphasized in the course?
options: Process-flow and object-state transition descriptions
Financial and learning scorecard perspectives with customer measures
Application components and technology nodes
Maturity domains and support processes
questions.explanation: IDEF3 includes process-flow and object-state transition descriptions.
questions.questionZh: 哪一对最符合课程强调的 IDEF3 两类图？
questions.answerZh: Process-flow description 和 object-state transition description。
questions.memory: IDEF3 = 流程流 + 对象状态。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 IDEF3；其他选项属于 BSC、ArchiMate 或 COBIT/ITIL。

questions.question: UML diagrams in the course are grouped into:
options: Service, support, delivery, and lifecycle practice groups
Structure, behaviour, and implementation
Enablers, results, and measures
Drivers, assessments, and outcomes
questions.explanation: The course groups UML diagrams as structure, behaviour, and implementation diagrams.
questions.questionZh: 课程中 UML 图被分成哪几类？
questions.answerZh: Structure、behaviour、implementation。
questions.memory: UML 三类：结构、行为、实现。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 UML 分类；其他选项来自 ITIL、EFQM 或 ArchiMate。

questions.question: BPMN is most suitable when the modelling task is to describe:
options: Business process flow with events, tasks, and gateways
Platform-specific deployment with server nodes and infrastructure placement
Quality-management enablers and performance results
Classification of enterprise artefacts in a matrix
questions.explanation: BPMN is a notation for business process modelling.
questions.questionZh: BPMN 最适合用来描述什么？
questions.answerZh: 业务流程、事件、任务、网关和交接。
questions.memory: BPMN = business process flow。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 BPMN；其他选项属于部署、EFQM 或 Zachman。

questions.question: Design support in an architecture language mainly means the language helps architects:
options: Create and structure architecture models for intended purposes
Guarantee every business goal has already been achieved in every context
Replace stakeholder discussions with email attachments
Limit architecture modelling to financial results only
questions.explanation: Design support concerns the ability to create useful architecture descriptions.
questions.questionZh: architecture language 的 design support 主要是什么意思？
questions.answerZh: 帮助架构师创建和组织适合目的的架构模型。
questions.memory: Design support = 帮你建模。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是设计建模支持；其他选项夸大或偏离。

questions.question: Communication support in an architecture language is strongest when it:
options: Provides understandable views for different stakeholders
Forces everyone to inspect the same technical database schema
Removes symbols so no one can discuss the model
Turns business strategy directly into compiled code
questions.explanation: Communication support helps different stakeholders understand relevant architecture views.
questions.questionZh: architecture language 的 communication support 什么时候最强？
questions.answerZh: 能为不同 stakeholder 提供可理解的 view。
questions.memory: Communication support = 不同人看得懂。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现沟通支持；其他选项造成信息过载或误解。

questions.question: Realization support is most concerned with:
options: Connecting architecture descriptions to implementation
Counting EFQM people results and society results
Choosing customer segments for value propositions
Auditing service-desk incidents, support records, and availability management
questions.explanation: Realization support helps move from architecture models toward implementation.
questions.questionZh: Realization support 主要关注什么？
questions.answerZh: 把架构描述连接到实施和执行。
questions.memory: Realization support = 从模型走向实现。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项体现落地；其他选项属于 EFQM、BMC 或 ITIL。

questions.question: Change support matters in EA because it helps architects:
options: Assess how changing one element affects related elements
Assume architecture elements are isolated units with no downstream impacts
Avoid documenting relationships between models
Replace impact analysis with customer surveys
questions.explanation: Change support enables impact analysis across related architecture elements.
questions.questionZh: EA 中 change support 为什么重要？
questions.answerZh: 帮助评估一个元素变化会如何影响相关元素。
questions.memory: Change support = impact analysis。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是影响分析；其他选项否认架构关系。

questions.question: A modelling language's way of modelling is mainly about:
options: Concepts and relationships made available by the language
The legal identity and registration form of the enterprise
The salary structure and hiring plan of system developers
The number of emails sent after an architecture meeting
questions.explanation: The way of modelling concerns the modelling concepts and relations provided by a language.
questions.questionZh: 建模语言的 way of modelling 主要关注什么？
questions.answerZh: 该语言提供哪些概念和关系来建模。
questions.memory: Way of modelling = 概念和关系。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是建模语言本身提供的概念结构；其他选项无关。

questions.question: A manager wants to track whether a strategy is working using indicators across finance, customers, internal processes, and learning. Which tool fits best?
options: Business Model Canvas
Balanced Scorecard
IDEF3 object-state diagram
TOGAF Enterprise Continuum
questions.explanation: BSC is for strategy measurement across four perspectives; BMC describes a business model.
questions.questionZh: 经理想用财务、客户、内部流程、学习等指标追踪战略是否有效，最适合哪个工具？
questions.answerZh: Balanced Scorecard。
questions.memory: 测战略执行 = BSC；讲商业模式 = BMC。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 BSC；BMC 更适合描述价值主张、客户、渠道、成本和收入。

questions.question: Which statement correctly separates a COBIT domain from a COBIT maturity level?
options: DSS is a process domain; Defined is a maturity level
Defined is a process domain; DSS is a maturity level
Both DSS and Defined are BMC revenue elements
Both DSS and Defined are UML diagram categories
questions.explanation: DSS is one of the COBIT domains; Defined is a maturity level label.
questions.questionZh: 哪项正确区分 COBIT domain 和 COBIT maturity level？
questions.answerZh: DSS 是流程域；Defined 是成熟度等级。
questions.memory: COBIT 五域和成熟度等级不要混。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项区分两套 COBIT 结构；其他选项颠倒或混入其他框架。

questions.question: A software organization now requires projects to follow organization-wide standard processes. Why does EA become more useful at this point?
options: EA aligns projects with shared standards and structures
EA is unnecessary because projects become isolated
EA records customer revenue after software release
EA replaces process guidance with a database schema and platform model
questions.explanation: At CMMI Level 3 and beyond, organization-wide standards make architecture alignment more important.
questions.questionZh: 软件组织要求项目遵循组织级标准流程时，为什么 EA 更有用？
questions.answerZh: EA 帮助项目对齐组织级标准和结构。
questions.memory: CMMI Level 3+ 强调组织标准，EA 帮助对齐。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项说明 EA 对跨项目标准化的支持；其他选项否认对齐价值。

questions.question: An architect defines rules for what a security view should contain and how it should be interpreted. This definition is a:
options: Viewpoint
View
Revenue stream
Technology node
questions.explanation: A viewpoint defines conventions for constructing and interpreting views.
questions.questionZh: 架构师定义 security view 应包含什么以及如何解释，这个定义是什么？
questions.answerZh: Viewpoint。
questions.memory: Viewpoint 是规则；view 是具体图。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 viewpoint；view 是按这些规则产生的具体表示。

questions.question: A team needs a cyclic method for developing enterprise architecture, not a software abstraction mapping from CIM to PIM to PSM. Which choice fits better?
options: TOGAF ADM
MDA transformation levels
IDEF1X data model
ITIL incident management
questions.explanation: TOGAF ADM is an iterative architecture development method; MDA is about model abstraction levels.
questions.questionZh: 团队需要企业架构开发循环方法，而不是 CIM/PIM/PSM 的软件抽象映射，选什么？
questions.answerZh: TOGAF ADM。
questions.memory: TOGAF ADM = 架构开发方法；MDA = 抽象层映射。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 TOGAF ADM；MDA、IDEF1X 和 ITIL 解决的问题不同。

questions.question: A model must show what controls and mechanisms constrain a function, not mainly the hand-off sequence between tasks. Which notation fits better?
options: IDEF0
BPMN
Balanced Scorecard
Business Model Canvas
questions.explanation: IDEF0 is built around functions with inputs, outputs, controls, and mechanisms.
questions.questionZh: 模型要显示一个功能受哪些 control 和 mechanism 约束，而不是任务交接顺序，哪种更合适？
questions.answerZh: IDEF0。
questions.memory: Control/mechanism 出现就想 IDEF0。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 IDEF0；BPMN 更偏流程顺序，BSC/BMC 不是功能建模语言。

questions.question: A team wants to model software component interactions after a business process has already been identified. Which language is more suitable?
options: UML
BPMN
EFQM
COBIT maturity scale
questions.explanation: UML is more suitable for software system structures and interactions; BPMN is for business process flow.
questions.questionZh: 业务流程已确定后，团队想建模软件组件交互，更适合哪种语言？
questions.answerZh: UML。
questions.memory: 业务流程 BPMN；软件系统 UML。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 UML；BPMN 更偏业务流程，EFQM/COBIT 不是软件交互建模语言。

questions.question: A modeller needs logical data entities and relationships, not a process-flow description. Which IDEF method fits best?
options: IDEF1X
IDEF3 process-flow description
IDEF0 functional decomposition
BPMN business-process notation
questions.explanation: IDEF1X is for data modelling; IDEF3 is for process description.
questions.questionZh: 建模者需要逻辑数据实体和关系，而不是流程流描述，哪种 IDEF 方法更合适？
questions.answerZh: IDEF1X。
questions.memory: IDEF1X = data；IDEF3 = process。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 IDEF1X；IDEF3/BPMN 偏流程，IDEF0 偏功能。

questions.question: Two departments both use the term account, but one means customer account and the other means accounting ledger. What is the main modelling problem?
options: A semantic inconsistency
A lack of service-desk staffing
An EFQM society result
A CMMI Level 5 requirement
questions.explanation: The same symbol or term can have different meanings, creating a semantic problem.
questions.questionZh: 两个部门都用 account，但一个指客户账户，一个指会计账簿，主要是什么建模问题？
questions.answerZh: 语义不一致。
questions.memory: 同词不同义 = semantic issue。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是语义问题；其他选项与模型含义不一致无关。

questions.question: An organization chooses a modelling language because it supports analysis, storage, versioning, and update of models in tools. Which support need is emphasized?
options: Way of supporting
Way of financing
Way of hiring
Way of legal registration
questions.explanation: Tooling for creating, analysing, storing, and updating models is part of the way of supporting.
questions.questionZh: 组织选择建模语言，因为工具能分析、存储、版本管理和更新模型，这强调哪种 support need？
questions.answerZh: Way of supporting。
questions.memory: 工具支持 = way of supporting。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是建模语言的支持方式；其他选项不是课程中的 language support 维度。

questions.question: A stakeholder says, 'I understand the architecture option and I agree it is acceptable, but I am not yet ready to allocate resources to it.' Which state is closest?
options: Agreed, but not committed
Aware, but not agreed
Committed, but not aware
Mailed, but not validated
questions.explanation: Agreement means acceptance of knowledge; commitment implies willingness to act or allocate resources.
questions.questionZh: stakeholder 说理解并同意方案，但还不准备投入资源，最接近什么状态？
questions.answerZh: Agreed, but not committed。
questions.memory: 同意不等于承诺行动。
questions.clue: agree acceptable but not allocate resources。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项区分 agreement 和 commitment；commitment 需要行动承诺。

questions.question: An architect already has a draft model and wants one expert to check whether it accurately represents their work. Which technique fits best?
options: Validation interview
Elicitation interview
Mass presentation
Business Model Canvas workshop
questions.explanation: Validation interviews check whether an existing model or view is accurate.
questions.questionZh: 架构师已有草稿模型，想让一位专家检查是否准确表达其工作，哪种技术最适合？
questions.answerZh: Validation interview。
questions.memory: 已有模型去核对 = validation interview。
questions.clue: already has a draft model + check accurately。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是验证访谈；elicitation 更偏从零收集知识。

questions.question: Which mapping best fits ArchiMate's main layers?
options: Customer journey-business; CRM system-application; server cluster-technology
CRM system-business; server cluster-motivation; customer journey-technology state
Revenue stream-application; customer segment-technology; router-business
IDEF0 control-business; CMMI level-application; BSC measure-technology
questions.explanation: Business activities/processes, applications, and infrastructure belong to business, application, and technology layers respectively.
questions.questionZh: 哪组映射最符合 ArchiMate 主要层次？
questions.answerZh: 客户旅程-业务层；CRM 系统-应用层；服务器集群-技术层。
questions.memory: Business 做业务；Application 是系统；Technology 是基础设施。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项准确对应三层；其他选项故意把层次混乱。

questions.question: A current architecture and a target architecture are both stable states, while the missing capabilities between them are analysed separately. Which terms fit?
options: The stable states are plateaus; the differences are gaps
The stable states are incidents; the differences are service requests
The stable states are BSC perspectives; the differences are measures
The stable states are UML classes; the differences are gateways
questions.explanation: In migration planning, plateaus are relatively stable architecture states and gaps are differences between them.
questions.questionZh: 当前架构和目标架构都是稳定状态，中间缺失能力另行分析，分别对应什么？
questions.answerZh: 稳定状态是 plateau，差异是 gap。
questions.memory: Plateau = state；Gap = difference。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 ArchiMate migration 概念；其他选项来自 ITIL、BSC 或 UML/BPMN。

questions.question: Which option best separates ArchiMate motivation concepts?
options: Driver creates pressure; assessment analyses; goal states intent; requirement states need
Driver hosts software; assessment stores data; goal routes traffic; requirement powers devices
Driver is a customer segment; assessment is a channel; goal is cost; requirement is partner
Driver is a UML class; assessment is a BPMN event; goal is IDEF0; requirement is CMMI
questions.explanation: Motivation concepts explain why change is needed and what conditions or intentions guide it.
questions.questionZh: 哪项最能区分 ArchiMate motivation concepts？
questions.answerZh: Driver 产生压力；assessment 分析；goal 表达期望意图；requirement 表达必须满足的条件。
questions.memory: Driver 推动，Assessment 分析，Goal 目标，Requirement 需求。
questions.explanationZh: 正确项是 motivation 概念；其他选项混入技术层、BMC 或其他建模语言。

lectures.title: Lecture 1
lectures.label: L1
lectures.summary: Architecture / EA 基础概念与 EA 出现原因。
lectures.examFocus: 零基础先背四件事：architecture 是元素+关系+原则；enterprise 不等于 IT 部门；stakeholder 有 concerns；EA 起因为复杂性和业务对齐不足。

discussions.title: Stakeholder / Enterprise
discussions.tip: stakeholder 有 concerns，enterprise 的范围比公司或 IT 部门更大。

discussions.title: Why Enterprise Architecture
discussions.tip: EA 主要解决 system complexity 和 poor business alignment。

lectures.title: Lecture 2
lectures.label: L2
lectures.examFocus: 本讲高频是内外部驱动、纵向/横向对齐，以及 BSC/BMC 的固定结构。看到 regulation/law/market 通常是 external driver。

discussions.title: Internal / External Drivers
discussions.tip: external driver 来自企业外部；vertical alignment 是 top strategy 到 bottom people。

discussions.title: Good Enterprise Architecture
discussions.tip: good EA 要提供共同理解，把战略目标和战术需求对齐。

lectures.title: Lecture 3
lectures.label: L3
lectures.summary: 治理/质量/服务框架与 EA 方法：EFQM、ISO、COBIT、ITIL、CMMI、ISO 42010、Zachman、TOGAF、MDA。
lectures.examFocus: 本讲题最多。先分清：EFQM/ISO 是质量绩效，COBIT/ITIL 是 IT governance/service，Zachman/TOGAF 是 EA 框架，MDA 是 CIM/PIM/PSM。

discussions.title: ISO 9001 vs EFQM
discussions.tip: ISO 9001 偏质量管理标准；EFQM 更宽，偏整体绩效卓越和持续改进。

discussions.title: ITIL vs COBIT
discussions.tip: COBIT tells what to control；ITIL explains how to run IT service processes。

lectures.title: Lecture 4
lectures.label: L4
lectures.summary: Description languages：IDEF、BPMN、UML，以及 TOGAF vs Zachman 回顾。
lectures.examFocus: 看到 IDEF0 选功能五件套，IDEF1X 选数据，BPMN 选业务流程，UML 选软件系统结构/行为/实现；共同弱点是跨域关系和语义不足。

discussions.title: TOGAF vs Zachman
discussions.tip: Zachman 是分类矩阵；TOGAF 是带 ADM 的架构开发方法。

discussions.title: BPMN vs UML vs IDEF
discussions.tip: 三者各有所长，但都难以完整覆盖 EA 的 business/application/technology 跨域关系。

lectures.title: Lecture 5
lectures.label: L5
lectures.examFocus: 本讲核心是“如何把复杂架构说清楚”：共同 vocabulary、parts+relations、view/viewpoint，以及 symbolic 与 semantic 的区别。

discussions.title: Integrating EA Domains
discussions.tip: 跨领域集成需要共同词汇、清楚关系，并用 views/viewpoints 服务不同 stakeholder concerns。

discussions.title: Symbolic / Semantic Integration
discussions.tip: symbolic 看符号表达，semantic 看符号意义；考试常用二者互相混淆。

lectures.title: Lecture 6
lectures.label: L6
lectures.summary: EA communication、conversation techniques、ArchiMate 三层与 migration concepts。
lectures.examFocus: 先背 Aware → Agreed → Committed，再背 ArchiMate 三层 Business/Application/Technology；Plateau 是阶段状态，Gap 是两个阶段的差。

discussions.title: Communication-focused EA Theories
discussions.tip: committing review 的关键词是让 stakeholders 在备选模型/视图中选择并承诺。

discussions.title: BMC to ArchiMate / ArchiMate Concepts
discussions.tip: BMC 的 value proposition 是前置概念；ArchiMate 用业务、应用、技术三层表达架构。

cheatSheet.title: BSC
cheatSheet.note: 四视角：Financial / Customer / Internal Process / Learning & Growth。三层：Mission / Objectives / Measures。

cheatSheet.title: BMC
cheatSheet.note: 中心是 Value Proposition；客户侧看 Segments / Relationships / Channels；赚钱看 Cost / Revenue。

cheatSheet.title: EFQM
cheatSheet.note: 9 criteria = 5 enablers + 4 results。比 ISO 9001 更宽，偏绩效卓越和持续改进。

cheatSheet.title: COBIT vs ITIL
cheatSheet.note: COBIT = what to control；ITIL = how to run IT service. COBIT 五域：EDM, APO, BAI, DSS, MEA。

cheatSheet.title: Zachman vs TOGAF
cheatSheet.note: Zachman 是分类矩阵；TOGAF 是带 ADM 的架构开发方法。

cheatSheet.title: MDA
cheatSheet.note: CIM -> PIM -> PSM：从业务/需求，到平台无关模型，再到平台特定模型。

cheatSheet.title: IDEF / BPMN / UML
cheatSheet.note: IDEF0 功能，IDEF3 流程，IDEF1X 数据；BPMN 业务流程；UML 软件系统图。

cheatSheet.title: View / Viewpoint
cheatSheet.note: View 是具体视图；Viewpoint 是构建和解释该类视图的规则。

cheatSheet.title: ArchiMate
cheatSheet.note: 三层：Business / Application / Technology。迁移概念：Plateau 是状态，Gap 是差距。
